creator: ish@amail.plala.or.jp
text:
Created attachment 233041
textdump.tar.0

Recent 14.0-current is bootable only single user mode.
If I want to boot normal mode, it hangs after showing 'Mounting file systems'.
As I'm using customized kernel, I build non customized GENERIC kernel for test.
But it doesn't bootup.
It was running normal on 14.0-current of master-n253891-fd6ca665d20 (1400053).
It doesn't run on 1400054 and after.
